Warrior.desc: Hemorrhage is a bleeding effect whose damage depends on the critical hit that triggered it. As a master of bleeding and critical effects, the warrior specializing in this tree will speed up the fight and increase their rage generation while ensuring that wounded enemies succumb to their injuries.

talents.name: Hemorrhage
talents.desc: Your [Physical] [CriticalStrike]s make the enemies bleed for ::damage%:: of the damage dealt over ::ref_dur::.

talents.name: Seasoned Soldier
talents.desc: Your [Physical] critical strikes grant ::var1:: [Rage].

talents.name: Bloodletting
talents.desc: Damage dealt by your bleeding effects increased by ::damage%::.

talents.name: Exsanguination
talents.desc: ::ref_name:: has a ::chance:: chance to critically strike.

talents.name: Master-at-arms
talents.desc: Your [Attack]s deal ::damage%:: increased critical damage.

talents.name: Bruise
talents.desc: Your [Physical] critical strikes increase all [Physical] damage suffered by enemies by ::ref_damage%:: for ::ref_duration::.

talents.name: Fighting Spirit
talents.desc: [CritChance] increased by ::val1%::.

talents.name: Surge of Violence
talents.desc: Your [ComboAttack] has a ::chance:: chance to allow your next ::ref_name:: to critically strike and cost no [Rage].

talents.name: Sever
talents.desc: Your [WeaponSkill]s deal ::damage%:: increased critical damage.

talents.name: Red Tempo
talents.desc: Damage from bleeding effects have a ::chance:: chance to reduce the cooldown of all your [WeaponSkill]s by ::time::.

talents.name: Rash Soul
talents.desc: [CooldownReduction] increased by ::val1%::.

talents.name: Exposed Essence
talents.desc: You ignore ::var1%:: of bleeding enemies' [MagicArmor] and [Armor].

talents.name: Cracking Blood
talents.desc: Damage from ::ref_name:: has a ::chance:: chance to deal an additional ::dmg::.

talents.name: Magic Conduction
talents.desc: [Magic] damage dealt to enemies affected by ::ref_name:: increased by ::damage%::.

talents.name: Infused Wound
talents.desc:
Your [Magic] critical strikes apply a sparked version of ::ref_name:: for ::damage%:: of the damage dealt over ::ref2_duration::.

Benefits from all ::ref_name::-related [Talent]s.

talents.name: Rage Shield
talents.desc: When you apply ::ref_name::, you gain a [Shield] absorbing an amount equal to ::var1%:: of your [MaxHealth] for ::ref2_duration::.

talents.name: Bloodfeast
talents.desc: ::ref_name:: heals you for ::damage%:: of the damage dealt.

talents.name: Crippling Bloodloss
talents.desc: ::ref_name:: reduces all damage dealt by affected enemies by ::damage%::.

talents.name: Hold the Line
talents.desc: Damage dealt increased by ::ref_damage%:: and damage suffered reduced by ::ref_damage%:: while ::ref2_name:: is active.

talents.name: Shattered Rage
talents.desc: When ::ref_name:: is destroyed, you deal ::dmg:: to nearby enemies.

talents.name: Zealous Warrior
talents.desc: [Fervor] increased by ::val1%::.

talents.name: Second Wind
talents.desc: Damage that should kill you leaves you at ::var1:: [Health] and grants you the effects of ::ref_name:: (::cooldown:: cooldown).

Mage.desc: Chaincast rewards mages who can chain skills within a set time limit. The reward is a skill with no cooldown that can trigger conduits for free. Mages who specialize in this tree will ensure that enemies are overwhelmed by a barrage of spells and Spark, where conduits reign supreme.

talents.name: Chaincast
talents.desc: Using ::var1:: [Skill]s grants you ::ref_name:: for ::ref_duration::.

talents.name: Reverberate
talents.desc: Consuming ::ref_name:: triggers your [Conduit]s twice.

talents.name: Temporal Compression
talents.desc: Each [Spark] point spent has a ::chance:: chance to reduce the cooldown of your [WeaponSkill]s by ::time::.

talents.name: Infinite Resources
talents.desc: While in combat, regenerates ::var1:: [Spark] point every ::dur1::.

talents.name: Prodigious Mind
talents.desc: Your [WeaponSkill]s have a ::chance:: chance to recover ::var1%:: of their [Spark] cost.

talents.name: Expanded Spirit
talents.desc: Increases your maximum [Spark] gauge by ::var1:: points.

talents.name: Conduit: Spark Explosion
talents.desc:
Unlocks a new Conduit : Spark Explosion.

Explodes, dealing ::ref_dmg:: to nearby enemies.

Activates when you consume [Spark] above the gauge threshold.

talents.name: Discipline
talents.desc:
[MagicMastery] increased by ::val1%::.

[PhysicalMastery] increased by ::var2%:: of your [MagicMastery].

talents.name: Chainstrike
talents.desc: Damage dealt by your [Attack]s increased by ::damage%:: while you are under ::ref_name::.

talents.name: Nimble Fingers
talents.desc: Your [Attack]s have a ::chance:: chance to reduce the cooldown of your [WeaponSkill]s by ::time::.

talents.name: Kinetic Surge
talents.desc: ::ref_name:: increases the [Physical] damage of your next [WeaponSkill] by ::damage%::.

talents.name: Power Circuit
talents.desc: [Magic] critical strikes increase your chance to land [Physical] critical strikes by ::ref_chance:: for ::ref_duration::.

talents.name: Amplification
talents.desc: Your [Attack]s deal ::damage%:: increased critical damage.

talents.name: High Voltage
talents.desc: Your [ComboAttack]s always critically strike while you are under ::ref_name::.

talents.name: Conduit Residues
talents.desc: Triggering [Conduit]s has a ::chance:: chance to regenerate ::var1:: [Spark] points.

talents.name: Fervent Wizard
talents.desc: [Fervor] increased by ::val1%::.

talents.name: Life Current
talents.desc: Any healing effect you provide has a ::chance:: chance to regenerate ::var1:: [Spark] points.

talents.name: Echoing Life
talents.desc: ::ref_name:: increases the healing effect of your next [WeaponSkill] by ::damage%::.

talents.name: Spark Flask
talents.desc: [RefillableFlask] regenerates ::var1:: [Spark] points.

talents.name: Flowing Vitality
talents.desc: While in combat, heal yourself for ::var1%:: of your [MaxHealth] every ::var2:: [Spark] point spent.

talents.name: Conduit: Lifebolt
talents.desc:
Unlocks a new Conduit : Lifebolt.

Launches a lifebolt healing the nearest wounded ally for ::ref_heal::.

Activates when you consume [Spark] above the gauge threshold.

Rogue.desc: Lethal Poison is a poison that can be stacked multiple times to amplify its effect. As a master of poisons and debuffs, a rogue specializing in this tree can ensure that their prey slowly succumbs to their wounds.

talents.name: Lethal Poison
talents.desc: Your [Attack]s have a ::chance:: chance to apply a stack of ::ref_name::, poisoning them for ::ref_dmg:: over ::ref_duration::, stacking up to ::ref_stacks::.

talents.name: Envenom
talents.desc: Your [ComboAttack] always applies ::ref_name:: to the target and to nearby enemies.

talents.name: Lethal Dose
talents.desc: Damage dealt by your poisons increased by ::damage%::.

talents.name: Finish the Job
talents.desc: Your [Attack]s have an additional ::chance:: chance to critically strike poisoned enemies.

talents.name: Opportunity Strike
talents.desc: Your [BasicAttack]s applying ::ref_name:: have a ::chance:: chance to strike again.

talents.name: Improved Mixture
talents.desc: ::ref_name:: now stacks up to ::var1:: times.

talents.name: Deadly Poison
talents.desc: ::ref_name:: has a ::chance:: chance per stack to critically strike.

talents.name: Venomous Finisher
talents.desc: ::ref_name:: always applied ::ref2_name:: and deals ::damage%:: increased damage for each stack.

talents.name: Acidic Splatter
talents.desc: ::ref_name:: has a ::chance:: chance per [ComboPoint] to spread acid to enemies, poisoning them for ::ref2_dmg:: over ::ref2_duration:: while reducing their [MagicArmor] by ::ref2_val1%::.

talents.name: Venom Infusion
talents.desc: Your [WeaponSkill]s have a ::chance:: chance to apply ::ref_name::.

talents.name: Up the Ante
talents.desc: [CooldownReduction] increased by ::val1%::.

talents.name: Intent to Kill
talents.desc: Gain ::var1:: [ComboPoint]s when an enemy affected by your ::ref_name:: dies.

talents.name: Noxious Stratagem
talents.desc: ::ref_name:: damage has a ::chance:: chance to reduce the cooldown of your [WeaponSkill]s by ::time::.

talents.name: Bullying the Weak
talents.desc: Damage dealt to poisoned enemies increased by ::damage%::.

talents.name: Virulent Magic
talents.desc: Excess applications of ::ref_name:: will deal ::dmg::.

talents.name: Adrenaline
talents.desc: Your [MoveSpeedFactor] is increased by ::ref_val1%:: as long as an enemy is affected by ::ref2_name::.

talents.name: Footwork
talents.desc: [DodgeChance] increased by ::val1%::.

talents.name: Leeching Poison
talents.desc: ::ref_name:: heals you for ::damage%:: of the damage dealt.

talents.name: Crippling Poison
talents.desc: The first time ::ref_name:: reaches the maximum number of stacks on an enemy, it stuns them for ::dur1::.

talents.name: Atrophic Poison
talents.desc: ::ref_name:: reduces all damage dealt by affected enemies by ::damage%:: per stack.

talents.name: Regenerating Miasmas
talents.desc: Heals you for ::var1%:: of your [MaxHealth] when you kill an enemy affected by ::ref1_name::.

talents.name: Cheat Death
talents.desc: Damage that should kill you leaves you at ::var1%:: of your [MaxHealth]. For ::ref_duration::, you take ::ref_val1%:: reduced damage. (::cooldown:: cooldown).

Priest.desc: Sunlight benefits both the priest and their allies by dealing damage with the next final combo attack. A priest specializing in this tree will punish their enemies with the power of light or bless their allies with a barrage of shields and soothing healing.

talents.name: Sunlight
talents.desc: [Skill]s that affect allies empower them for ::ref_duration:: with ::ref_name::. The next [ComboAttack] consum ::ref_name:: to deal an additional ::ref_dmg::.

talents.name: Soothing Rays
talents.desc: ::ref_name:: heals for ::damage%:: of the damage dealt.

talents.name: Fervent Defender
talents.desc: [Fervor] increased by ::val1%::.

talents.name: Crusader's Resolve
talents.desc: Your [Armor] is increased by ::val1%:: and the threat generated by your [Magic] damage by ::var1%::.

talents.name: Radiance

talents.name: Authority

talents.name: Luminous Bastion

talents.name: Zealous Fighter

talents.name: Might of the Executioner

talents.name: Potent Fortitude

talents.name: Swift Justice

talents.name: Piercing Light
talents.desc: ::ref_name:: ignores ::damage%:: of [MagicArmor].

talents.name: Oppressive Rays
talents.desc: ::ref_name:: has a ::chance:: additional chance to critically strike.

talents.name: Burning Rays
